rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Impacket AtExec Suspicious Temp File Creation

rules.rule_text:
title: Impacket AtExec Suspicious Temp File Creation
id: 22514cf3-83dd-4949-931e-69a6d6abe154
status: experimental
description: Detects Atexec.py (Impacket) suspicious file creation in Windows temp
  directory.
references:
- https://www.13cubed.com/downloads/impacket_exec_commands_cheat_sheet.pdf
- https://www.hackingarticles.in/impacket-guide-smb-msrpc/
- https://u0041.co/blog/post/1
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2023/01/08
tags:
- attack.s0357
- attack.execution
- attack.t1053
- attack.t1053.002
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: file_event
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \cmd.exe
    TargetFilename|re: ^C:\\Windows\\Temp\\[A-Za-z]{8}\.tmp$
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
